summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 8 features: Geography Master (CRUD for Countries/States/Cities), City/State/Country autocomplete in Customer form with cascading fill, Project card 2-row layout, Global Search, Cascading filters on Task/Project/Meeting lists, and removed '+ New Task' from topbar. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All new geography features implemented correctly with proper data-testid attributes
City autocomplete with cascading fill to State/Country working perfectly
Cascading filter logic in Task/Project/Meeting lists working correctly
Global search searches across Tasks, Projects, and Meetings simultaneously
Member chip color changed from purple (#4f46e5/#e0e7ff) to blue (#2563eb/#dbeafe)
seed_data_creation: 166 countries, 36 Indian states/UTs, 207 Indian cities seeded via seed-geography.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 tested Geography Master module (166 countries, 36 states, 207 cities with CRUD + search), Customer form with city/state/country autocomplete cascading, Project card 2-row layout (Owner & Customer), Global search functionality, Cascading filters on Task/Project/Meeting list pages, and topbar without '+ New Task' button. Member chip color is now light blue (#dbeafe/#2563eb). All features working correctly.

tested: GET /api/geography/cities?search=ahmedabad returns city with state_name and country_name

elements_verified: State shows country_name, City shows state_name and country_name

tested: City field shows autocomplete dropdown on typing
Selecting city auto-fills State and Country fields
Customer displayed on separate line below Owner
Top ribbon has no '+ New Task' button
Theme toggle and notifications still present
Results include Tasks, Projects, and Meetings
Clicking result navigates to correct page
Project filter narrows when Customer selected
Meeting filter narrows when Project selected
Owner filter narrows when Customer selected
Project filter narrows when Customer selected
